Comparing it to another hotel we stayed at in Saigon, district 3 however, I would have picked that instead as it was more family friendly.

reviews.title: I recommend a one-night stay just for the scenery.
reviews.text: I have been living in Ho Chi Minh for 10 years. I went for a hotel staycation over the weekend. The reservation team and the check-in/out team are both a mess. The staff don't seem to know their duties and only get flustered when complaints are made. I've visited almost all 5-star hotels in Ho Chi Minh, but this is the first time I've encountered such a disorganized hotel. The spa is also lacking for a 5-star hotel. The price is three times that of a local luxury spa, but the service is inferior. The pool is very small, and the gym facilities are also subpar. The room was a corner club room, which was supposed to be a higher category, but it was narrow and very shabby, which surprised me. The quality of amenities is... the toothbrush is of such low quality that the bristles come out when brushing. The advantage is that the F&B team is outstanding. The food at the lounge and breakfast buffet is really delicious, and the staff in the restaurant and lounge are very well trained. Also, the view is the best in Ho Chi Minh. Finally, it's really unfortunate that a hotel with the best physical presence as the tallest building in Ho Chi Minh is being run so poorly. There are no good restaurants nearby, and tourist attractions are far away, so I wouldn't recommend it to travelers at all, but if you want to see the overall scenery of Ho Chi Minh, I would recommend staying for one night if you go.
reviews.response:
Dear Yoon,

Thank you for taking the time to share your detailed feedback. We deeply regret to hear about the challenges you experienced during your stay, particularly with our reservation and check-in teams, spa services, and room amenities. Your comments are invaluable in helping us identify areas where we can improve.

We are, however, pleased that you enjoyed the exceptional views, as well as the efforts of our F&B team. Your kind words about the lounge and breakfast buffet will surely encourage our staff to continue delivering excellent service.

We understand your concerns regarding the overall value and convenience of our location and facilities. Please rest assured that we are actively working on enhancing our guest experience to match the potential of our iconic property.

We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back in the future and provide a much improved experience.

reviews.text:
I booked the staycation package. I emailed twice ahead for the 10 am early checkin, no answer. I called and I was told to call the day of arriving and check...whats the point?
So we decided to go normal check in time, fairly empty, we checked in, be aware they request id for young children (mine is 3). After checking in we were asked to wait for double checking the room, after 20 minutes I enquired again still wait.
Regarding the room upgrade, also part of the pack, " sorry ser, we are busy today but you have corner room" ah yes. 
Room was nice, fridge was broken, I reported it 3 times, we left still being broken.
The swimmingpool is tiny, and I mean tiny, and no children area, there are like 5 chairs for a hotel with over 200 rooms.

The restaurant for breakfast it is fine, but very busy, good coffee, the rest good if you like vietnamese food, but forget otherwise.

Staff in general are nice and try, many are hospitality students, but too much over promising and under delivering

reviews.title: Tolle Aussicht und Lage

Wir haben uns für das Hotel entschieden weil es in einem der größten Gebäude Südostasiens ist und die Aussicht dementsprechend wirklich toll ist. Die Zimmer sind sauber und geräumig. Die Lage ist schön und zentral. Das Personal war sehr hilfsbereit aber nicht aufdringlich. Wir hatten einen schönen Aufenthalt und können das Hotel weiterempfehlen, finden es allerdings etwas zu teuer im Vergleich zu anderen Hotels mit vergleichbarer Aussicht und Ausstattung.

reviews.text: It's a nice Hotel, not far from the city centre with one of the best breakfast I ever had. Rooms are quite small, but the beds are very comfortable and the view ( we had a corner room ) was awesome. We had a great price, because of COVID, but I'm not sure if I would choose this hotel with pre -COVID rates. They were some minor issues, like not flushing toilet, so they needed to change our room, not working TV , which they fixed straight away and a bit strange accusation that we burned the ironing board by checking out, which we didn't.  Overall very nice stay, staff was attentive and carrying.

The location of the hotel is probably amount 20mins from the city centre, but they have put a mall below the hotel with some great restaurants and there is a beautiful park with lots of kids playground equipment available to hotel patrons and apartment occupants only. All in all a great stay, but if you suffer from travel sickness the lifts up and down can make you a bit sick!

reviews.positives: 員工相當友善、風景絕美。早餐在66樓餐廳東西豐富，有許多內容在其他酒店沒有。47樓有無邊際泳池，看夕陽剛剛好。48樓Lobby相當挑高。61樓行政樓層其實是兩間直角的邊間拼在一起，雖然高級但並沒有房間很大的感覺XD 71樓行政酒廊很舒服，員工都會主動噓寒問暖。75-77樓雖然不屬於飯店設施，但持房卡可以參觀，風景相當漂亮。整體而言會想再回訪！
reviews.negatives: 基本上沒什麼缺點，嚴格來說算是雞蛋裡挑骨頭…行政酒廊HH會提前開始準備 (五點鐘開始但四點就會把一些水果點心收起來)。因為當地政策HH的時候無法帶小孩。泳池關門時間有點早。

reviews.title: 5-Star Hotel At Its Best
reviews.text: This hotel is located on Landmark 81, the highest building in South East Asia. Its Executive suite is extremely posh with panoramic view of the surrounding area. In addition, you get complimentary cocktail which let you catch the evening sunset every 5-7pm. Only downside is that the room is quite close to other  executive suites, which gives you a clear view of what the hotel guests of the other rooms are doing inside their room so with the curtains up and star-gazing at night seems quite impossible. Service-wise is really top notch, as I asked for a late check out since my flight is late in the evening and I was thinking maybe I can get until 1pm or 2pm, but was told I could actually late check out till 6pm. This is really 5 star service at its best.

reviews.title: Beautiful Luxury Hotel
reviews.text: This hotel opened in April 2019. Beautifully decorate and luxuries in every aspect of a 5-star hotel, high-quality furnishing. The room is clean, bedding is very comfortable, my room views on the 57th floor were spectacular day and night. The hotel starts at level 48 reception desk, the observation deck, Skyview, opened on 28 April 2019. The deck, spanning from floor 79 to floor 81 is currently Vietnam's highest observation deck. If you are not a guest at the hotel, you'll need to pay an entry fee to visit the Skyview. The rooms and throughout the hotel, facilities are fitted with touch screen technology.  The staff were very friendly and helpful, all speak English very well.  The food and drinks are a little pricey as expected from a high-end hotel. Would stay at this hotel again.
reviews.response:

reviews.title: The best stay
reviews.text:
It is located a bit away from the city center, but I was able to relax and fully enjoy my hotel life. The area around the hotel felt like a small town, allowing me to shop, see Vietnamese ingredients at the supermarket, and I enjoyed pleasant walks in the park right in front of the hotel after breakfast. There were famous chocolate shops and cafes nearby that I utilized.

Since my return flight was at midnight, I was able to leave my luggage with them until the evening. Later, they lent me a shower, allowing me to go to the airport feeling refreshed, which I was very grateful for. I forgot to catch the name, but a male staff member helped carry my large suitcase to the taxi with a smile, which made me happy. The service at this hotel was impressive, making my stay unforgettable. I will definitely stay here again when I visit Vietnam.
reviews.response:
Dear JUNKO,
Thank you so much for sharing your experience in such detail! We're truly happy to hear that you enjoyed the peaceful surroundings and the charm of the local area. We'll be sure to pass along your kind words to our staff, especially the gentleman who helped with your suitcase — gestures like his truly reflect the spirit of our service. We're honored to have made your stay unforgettable, and we can't wait to welcome you back on your next visit to Vietnam!
Warm regards, 
Vinpearl Landmark 81, Autograph Collection

reviews.title: Vietnam Proud
reviews.text:
The tallest building in HCM. 
You enjoy panaromic view, the river, the garden from 54 floor (our room).
The breakfast served at Level 66 with many choices including egg benedict with salmon & to go you can ask latte they will pack in Vinpearl Landmark 81 cup.

The room is modern but for smoker, you are doom.  Go down to Lobby then changed lift to garden then you can only smoke at public area outside the building.
reviews.response:
Dear Nur,

Thank you for sharing your detailed experience! We’re thrilled to know you enjoyed the panoramic views of the river and garden from your room on the 54th floor. Breakfast on Level 66, especially the egg benedict with salmon, is a highlight we’re glad you appreciated. We’re also pleased to hear you enjoyed the convenience of our to-go latte service.

We regret the inconvenience for smokers, as smoking is only permitted in designated outdoor areas. Your feedback is valuable, and we’ll consider ways to make this process smoother for our guests.

We hope to welcome you back for another delightful stay!

Best Regards,
Vinpearl Landmark 81, Autograph Collection

reviews.title: Только благодаря этому отелю нам понравилось в Хошимине :)
reviews.positives:
Можно сказать, что наше пребывание в Хошимине сделал именно этот отель. Сам город оставил не столько впечатлений, сколько отель. А мы избалованы хорошими отелями. :) 
Вы не пожалеете, если забронируете его, а еще лучше клубный номер с доступом в лаундж. Перекусы в удобное время, можно обойтись и без ужина.
В отеле прекрасно все: сам номер, косметика, постельное белье, подушки, одеяло, вид из окна, площадки для курения с потрясающими видами и оборудованными розетками, можно поработать на свежем воздухе с шикарным видом. Потрясающий завтрак. 
Очень рекомендую.

reviews.title: Awesome Club Lounge
reviews.text:
Booked 2 club access rooms for myself and my son & his fiancé to enjoy the view and wind down on our last night in HCMC at the end of 2 weeks in Vietnam. 
It was a brilliant choice. Check in was easy and comfortable at the club floor reception on 71st floor. Their check in time is rather late  at 3pm. My room was ready at 2.30pm but My son’s room wasn’t ready until 3.45pm. However, they didn’t mind too much as they enjoyed time at the club lounge while waiting for the room. 
My room was corner one with 180 degree awesome view of HCMC. 
We enjoyed unusually long cocktail hour (5-8pm). Food and drinks selection were excellent and quiet as no children are allowed during cocktail hours. However, I found breakfast selection was quite average and very crowded and noisy. 
All in all it was very nice stay to enjoy our last night in HCMC.
reviews.response:
Dear Lydia,

Thank you for taking the time to share your detailed review. We’re delighted that you chose our hotel to wind down after your two weeks in Vietnam, and we’re thrilled to hear it was a brilliant choice for your stay.

It’s great to know that you enjoyed the spectacular 180-degree views from your corner room and the extended cocktail hours with excellent food and drink options. We’re also pleased that the Club Lounge provided a comfortable space for your family to relax while waiting for the room to be ready.

We do regret that breakfast did not meet your expectations due to the crowd and noise. Your feedback is valuable, and we will use it to explore ways to enhance the breakfast experience for our guests.

We’re grateful for your kind words and hope to welcome you and your family back for another wonderful stay in the future!

reviews.negatives: Gymmet har begränsad utrustning och består främst av konditionsmaskiner. Poolen är något liten och utsikten är inte särskilt imponerande. reviews.title: I trusted Marriott’s Bonvoy. However, it seems that the system is not applied well here yet.
reviews.positives:
There is nothing good about it except that it is located on a high floor.
Breakfast was nothing special compared to the price I paid.
reviews.negatives:
1. There was no prior notice that the swimming pool was under construction. Notified when checking in. I had no choice
2. After checking in, I was given the wrong room number so I had to wait in front of another room for over 15 minutes.
They don't even know what's wrong
Write another room number on the card key.

3. I paid extra to use the lounge, but children are not allowed between 5pm and 8PM.
There was also no prior notice at all.
If I had known, I would have never had free time.
The reason was that they refused to serve alcohol during cocktail hour.
If so, children should be banned from all restaurants.
And I don't understand why cocktail hour is held at the same time as dinner.
So, I visited early before 5 o'clock to feed the child, but was refused access because it wasn't ready yet... Not only me, but other families were also standing there dumbfounded.
Basically, I had no reason to pay this fee.
I request a refund for the lounge fee
4. Around 9 pm on Friday night, I woke up to the sound of construction. I checked and the swimming pool was under construction (this is absolutely ridiculous).
Same noise even during the day on Saturday
Complaint. After I went out, the staff came into the room and left chocolate.
This feels worse
5. The shower didn't turn off properly so I could hear the sound of water dripping all night long. Eliminate sound by wrapping it with a towel
6. The bathtub's water-blocking device is broken, so you have to turn it in and out every time, endlessly.

Why didn't you make any further complaints?
I came to rest with my family
So I chose a place away from the busy city center and I didn't want to have to deal with unnecessary emotional stress with the employees. I didn't want to ruin the mood of the trip.
But I paid $1,300 for two days and couldn't use the lounge even once.
The facilities were a mess and I couldn't imagine doing construction on a Friday night and Saturday.

reviews.positives: Beautiful panorama from my room
reviews.negatives:
The swimming pool has a laughable bar service and the guy will chase you for more drinks like I am an ATM. Plus he will try to chase you out even before you finished your last drink.

I forgot some personal belongings there (very light stuff that you can put in a single envelope and complimentary post  it out for a few bucks) but instead I was asked 75 USD to get it shipped to a nearby country.

Is this the treatment that you expect from the best hotel in town and  when you shell out 300 USD per night in Vietnam?

reviews.negatives:
The lifts are beyond stupid. Form over function.

Hotels who think egg stations are a good idea need to stop it! Either have them on the buffet or to order a la carte.

I had confirmed our arrival time in advance and we arrived exactly on time. However we couldn't check in because the last people had a late check out. This surely could have been avoided with some forethought.

Service in the lounge was slow although this was addressed.

Because of these issues, and one or two more, everyone was very keen to apologies. This was a nice thought but having 5 or 6 different people come to apologies was just too much.

Its a lovely hotel with polite, attentive staff. It just needs more thought into the customer experience

reviews.title: Lovely room with great views
reviews.text:
We took advantage of the agoda offer at the time paying a very reasonable rate for the room. Our room had good views over District 2 and beyond and was clean, well-furnished and comfortable. A room overlooking the centre of the city would have been nice but you can't have everything!

The facilities were excellent; good swimming pool and gym/sauna area, and an excellent breakfast buffet the following morning. This had views over the city which was great.

The staff at the hotel were excellent. Richie personally helped us to plan our evening and make bookings for us. An added bonus was holding free entry to the ice bar on the 77th floor - a real treat!

Expect to pay above the odds for food and drink in the bars above the hotel. (48th floor) but there is a well-stocked mall below with plenty more food options.

Overall, a really good stay and we will definitely be returning when the weather is better!

reviews.title: Excellent Hotel in Ho Chi Minh City
reviews.text: We have a very good time for staying at Vinpearl Landmark 81, autograph collection hotel. My room located at 58/F. The buffet breakfast located at 66/F. The resturant is full of excellent view and excellent food. There are so many kind of food to be selected. You could even order egg benedict which was seldom found in hotel buffet breakfast. The gym room is operated in 24 hr. The swimming pool is located at 48/F with excellent city view. The reception and room service provide excellent rapid response for request with good attitude. There is a mega mall at G/F for food and shopping with international brand and local brand.  It is really an enjoyable experience to stay in Autograph Collection. Will come again.

reviews.title: Unforgettable Luxury: A Stellar Experience at Marriott - Vinpearl Landmark 81
reviews.positives:
My recent stay at Marriott - Vinpearl Landmark 81 exceeded all expectations, thanks to its super helpful and courteous staff. From the moment we stepped into the hotel, the service was top-notch. The staff went above and beyond by surprising us with a complimentary room upgrade, adding an extra layer of luxury to our experience. Their genuine friendliness and eagerness to assist made us feel truly valued as guests.

The hotel's commitment to cleanliness was evident throughout our stay. The rooms were immaculate, and every amenity we could think of was provided. However, the real showstopper was the panoramic view from the 50th floor. Waking up to such a breathtaking sight each morning was a memorable experience in itself. The efficiency of the check-in and check-out processes further contributed to the overall positive impression. Moreover, the convenience of being able to leave our luggage at the hotel after checking out allowed us to make the most of our last day in the city without any hassles. Marriott - Vinpearl Landmark 81 truly made our stay exceptional, and I would wholeheartedly recommend it to fellow travelers.

reviews.title: One of the best hotel I've stayed at!
reviews.text: Stayed here two nights after my wedding. Even though the room wasn't too big, it still managed to feel spacious. With excellent views of the city and the Saigon river, it was worth it to just chill and relax by the glass wall. Staff here were extremely friendly and the overall facilities here were very new. Buffet breakfast was good with varieties of local Vietnamese cuisine and a wide selection of bread and pastries. Common western favorites like the pancakes, waffles, bacon and sausages were available as well. Overall we had a very pleasant stay  including my friends and family who came along the for the wedding as well. Will be back again for sure when I visit Ho chi minh city again.

reviews.title: 日本人向けラグジュアリーホテルです。
reviews.text:
ベンタイン市場やブイビエン通りまでタクシーで15分700円位のところにあるビィングループのラグジュアリーホテルです。48階がロビーでその上か客室になります。キングサイズのシングル利用朝食付きで今回24000円位でした。カタコトの英語でも通じます。いざとなったらGoogle翻訳で全く問題なしです。
アゴダからの予約であれば事前にクレジットカード決済だと思いますが、到着後、デポジットとして現金かクレジットカードで1人1万円位仮払いする必要があります。クレジットカードの場合は室内の有料ものや部屋チャージでのスパを使わなければ、チェックアウト時にマイナス決済してくれるので特に問題なしです。
48階から上の客室や75階のカフェやレストランには宿泊カードがないと上がれません。
因みに、77階のカフェは小さいですがテラスあるので外に出れます。(風が少し強いです)オリジナルドリンクは豊富でかなり良いですが、カフェの作りや雰囲気としては全く期待しないで下さいw
因みに、空港までは通常時で約20分位、タクシーで23万ドン1400円くらいです。
フライト時刻の90分前に空港に到着するようにすれば良いと思います。
因みに、チェックアウト後の荷物も遅い時間まで預かってくれるので便利なのと、ホテル前からのタクシーもきちんとした料金で行ってくれるのでGRUBなどを使う必要もありません。
因みに、1階にはユニクロや徒歩1分のところに24時間のサークルKもあるので、不自由はありません。比較的夜遅くまでやってるちょっとした飲食店も数は多くはないですがあります。
ホーチミンに来てちょっと良いホテルに泊まって見たいなぁと思う方にはオススメです。夜景はかなり綺麗ですが10分で飽きますw
朝食はビュッフェで、ベトナム料理以外に、卵料理、ハムやパテ、お粥にパンがすらっとあります。フルーツやフレッシュジュースも多くあります。中国人が少なければガヤガヤしていないので、ゆったり寛ぎながら朝食が取れます。
因みに、朝食の時間は6時半から18時までです。9時半入店がギリと思って下さい。
それとチェックアウトは12時なのでこれもゆっくり出来て良いですね～。チェックアウト後に荷物を預けて、タクシーで市街中心地に出て、買い物してからホテルに戻って空港に行くのがオススメパターンです！
